strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React expertise matching the primary stack
Current hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship, and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin is absent and Java experience appears dated/limited, weakening coverage of secondary backend services
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named, though broader testing expertise is evident
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades across web, mobile, and backend systems, and his recent work directly covers the hardest-to-find requirement: AI agent and MCP tooling development. Core stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) is strong, and his testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, test-runner authorship, workshops) fits an internal tooling role well. The gaps — Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicitly named test frameworks — are framework-level rather than conceptual and should be quickly learnable given his polyglot history.
